description: Developing and maintaining Tizen OS application features using C++ and C#. Developed a USB preset feature for E-paper signage devices and an early-warning feature for certificate expiration across enterprise displays that received the team's Best Feature Award. Maintained multiple modules for Tizen OS, achieving up to 80% power savings. Developed an on-device AI feature integrating OpenAI Whisper and built Android applications using Jetpack Compose.

organization: Centre for Networked Intelligence, IISc Bengaluru
description: Studied NVIDIA GPU architecture and parallel computing concepts for high-performance computing workloads. Conducted experiments that outperformed Linux CPU governors in energy efficiency by up to 80%. Collaborated with IBM Research on GPU scheduling techniques and implemented Machine Learning models in CUDA C++.
Worked on Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) systems for EEG signal analysis and classification. Studied and implemented MLP classifiers and Neural Networks for brain signal processing tasks.
